output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?hostCountryLabel ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P31 wd:Q864915 ; wdt:P134 wd:Q15147 ; wdt:P139 ?hostCountry ; wdt:P128 ?winner ; wdt:P585 ?year .
  ?hostCountry rdfs:label ?hostCountryLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?hostCountryLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?winnerLabel) = "en")
  .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
output.answer: The last World Cup was held in Qatar, and Argentina won.

SELECT DISTINCT ?hostCountryLabel ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P31 wd:Q864915 ; wdt:P134 wd:Q15147 ; wdt:P139 ?hostCountry ; wdt:P128 ?winner ; wdt:P585 ?year .
  ?hostCountry rdfs:label ?hostCountryLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?hostCountryLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .

}
